description: Write a new exported function `save_benchmark_results(results, path)` in `R/benchmark.R`. The function should: (1) validate that `results` has class `'benchmark_result'`; (2) serialise `results` to `path` using `saveRDS()`; (3) print a message 'Saved benchmark results to <path>' using `message()`; (4) return `path` invisibly. Include full Roxygen documentation.
